steps.title: Convert the percent increase to a growth factor
steps.content:
When the number of comments increases by 190%, the new value is the original value plus 190% of it. Mathematically:

$$\text{new} = \text{old} + 1.90 \times \text{old} = \text{old}(1 + 1.90) = \text{old} \times 2.9$$

So the growth factor per hour is 2.9.

steps.title: Apply the exponential model formula
steps.content:
For exponential growth, the model is $C = C_0 r^t$, where $C_0$ is the initial value and $r$ is the growth factor per time unit. Here, $C_0 = 40$ and $r = 2.9$, giving:

$$C = 40(2.9)^t$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
